title: uXu Archive Data Schema
description: Schema for any archive hosted in the uXu platform. Every archive's data.json must validate against this.

artist.description: Artist or band name this archive documents

curator.description: Name or handle of the person maintaining this archive, for attribution

description.description: What this archive contains and why it exists

websiteUrl.description: Optional link to the curator's site or socials

featured.description: Set by the uXu maintainer to promote this archive to the front page. Defaults to false for new community submissions.

accentGlyph.description: Optional small unicode glyph used as a quiet personal signature next to the archive's curator credit (e.g. a regional flag star). Purely decorative, never required.

shows.description: Array of show objects. Minimum 10 shows for a new archive submission.

setlist.description: List of songs performed, in order if known. For sets, prefix with 'Set 2:' etc. in the song string, or use the tracks array within audioSources for precise per-track data.

notes.description: Context, history, or anything notable about this show

archiveOrgId.description: DEPRECATED single-source field, kept for backwards compatibility. Prefer audioSources.

audioSources.description: One or more recordings of this show, ranked by the curator. List best quality first; the player defaults to index 0.

sourceType.description: sbd = soundboard (best), matrix = multi-track master, aud = audience recording, fm = FM broadcast

label.description: Short human label for this source, e.g. 'Charlie Miller matrix mix' or 'Best available SBD'

tracks.description: Optional explicit track list. If omitted, the player fetches the track list live from the Internet Archive metadata API at archiveOrgId.

duration.description: mm:ss, optional, used only as a fallback if the player cannot read media duration
